name: Zombi Efem
short_description: The world has turned to ash, and civilization has collapsed. The chosen savior isn't a soldier, but a Gamer who spent their life behind a screen. Transform an old train into a mobile death machine, deploy turrets, manage your economy, and never stop moving. On these endless rails, to stop is to die
detailed_description:
THE GRAND PLAN BACKFIRED. World leaders and the scientists serving them aimed to reduce humanity under the guise of "population control." But there was one variable they didn't calculate: The dead didn't go quietly. They came back. When billions of corpses rose again with an insatiable hunger, kingdoms fell, armies collapsed, and the world was buried in dark ash.

Outside, there is only death and zombies. But for one person, this apocalypse is merely the simulation they have been preparing for all their life.

As a master of strategy and reflexes whose life has been spent in front of a computer, you have turned the scrap train next to your house into humanity's last stronghold. Your mission is simple but seemingly impossible: Circle the globe without stopping, gather resources, evolve, and don't release the trigger until the last zombie on earth is dead.

CREATE AN ARMORED BEAST

Turn an ordinary locomotive into a rolling fortress. Your train is not just a vehicle; it is your home, your weapon, and your shield.

  • AI Turrets: Establish strategic defense lines across your train wagons.

  • Manual Control: When things get out of hand, take the helm of the powerful main turret and show off your marksmanship.

  • Speed & Fuel Balance: The faster you drive, the safer you are, but you will burn fuel much quicker. If you can't find the balance, you become dinner for the zombies.

ECONOMY AND STRATEGY

Pulling the trigger isn't enough; survival is a matter of mathematics.

  • Scrap Economy: Collect rare parts along the rails. Make the right investments to upgrade your turrets.

  • Random Upgrades (Roguelite): Adapt your strategy instantly with random power-ups granted every time you level up.

  • Radar & Tracking: Spot enemy waves in advance and adjust your route and defenses accordingly.

BATTLE FOR SURVIVAL

The enemy isn't just the zombies; your own body can betray you.

  • Hunger & Thirst: You must manage your character's biological needs while mowing down zombie hordes.

  • Dark Atmosphere: Outside is pitch black and full of ash. Fear is the most loyal passenger on this journey.

KEY FEATURES

  • Mobile Base Defense: A dynamic Tower Defense experience on a constantly moving train.

  • Hybrid Combat System: Manage automated AI turrets while directly intervening in the battle by controlling the manual turret at critical moments.

  • Deep Economy Management: Build a tense strategy involving limited resources, rare parts, and fuel management.

  • Randomized Upgrade System: Luck and strategy-based leveling mechanics that make every playthrough unique.

  • Dark Apocalyptic Atmosphere: Immersive visuals set in ruined cities, ash-covered plains, and endless darkness.

  • Endless Horde: Massive enemy waves that get progressively harder with the goal of clearing every single zombie on Earth.

You don't need to be a hero to save the world. You just need to be a good gamer. Start the engine. The journey through hell begins.

supported_languages:
English*, German, Turkish*, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
